name: Phase Program Review Child
outcome_goal: Phase 50 review runs as a real child workflow and explicitly spawns the healer child workflow when review completes.
anti_requirements: Do NOT advance from Phase 50 to Phase 51
Do NOT bypass the review findings-first posture
Do NOT spawn any workflow other than the Phase 50 healer child from this review child

jobs.label: phase_50_review
jobs.description: Review the current Phase 50 authority/compiler changes as a code review
jobs.outcome_goal: Any remaining risks in lookup policy, generated authority drift, or phase governance are called out before healing
jobs.prompt:
Work from `/workspace` only. Review the Phase 50 authority/compiler work as a code review, not a summary.

Read from these sandbox paths:
- `/workspace/planning/phase-program/phase_050_current_packet.md`
- `/workspace/planning/phase-program/praxis_0_100_registry.json`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/system_authority/workflow_migration_authority.json`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/system_authority/generate_workflow_migration_authority.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/_generated_workflow_migration_authority.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/migrations.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/storage/postgres/schema.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_schema_authority_artifacts.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_migration_policy_boundaries.py`
- `/workspace/Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_workflow_migration_contracts.py`

Prioritize findings on:
- canonical lookup accidentally reading bootstrap-only or deprecated files
- derived authority artifacts drifting from the JSON source
- bootstrap/readiness policy being reconstructed at runtime instead of consumed from generated authority
- phase registry structure that is still too weak for workflow-driven execution
- missing or weak tests on policy boundaries and authority drift

Findings first with file references. If no findings remain, say so explicitly and mention residual validation gaps.

jobs.label: phase_50_healer_spawn
jobs.description: Spawn the Phase 50 healer child workflow from the review child
jobs.outcome_goal: Healing runs as an explicit grandchild workflow with durable lineage
jobs.prompt:
Spawn the healer child workflow and nothing else.

Work from `/workspace` and run this exact command block:

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
import subprocess

bundle = json.loads(os.environ['PRAXIS_EXECUTION_BUNDLE'])
parent_run_id = str(bundle['run_id'])
parent_job_label = str(bundle['job_label'])
subprocess.run([
    './scripts/workflow.sh',
    'spawn-managed',
    parent_run_id,
    'config/cascade/specs/W_phase_program_healer_child_20260414.queue.json',
    '--reason',
    'phase.healer',
    '--parent-job-label',
    parent_job_label,
], check=True)
print(json.dumps({
    'parent_run_id': parent_run_id,
    'parent_job_label': parent_job_label,
    'dispatch_reason': 'phase.healer',
}, indent=2))
PY
```

Rules:
- Do not edit repo files
- Do not apply healing inline in this dispatch job
- Print the spawned child run id and parent lineage clearly in the final output
